title: tristagma uniflorum f. album
intro: Tristagma uniflorum f. album, also known as white oneflower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Amaryllidaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health conditions, including fever and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Tristagma uniflorum f. album include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and flu. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential interactions.
